prompt: A soft flat-color anime illustration of a cute elf girl lounging sideways on a frilly bed in a pastel bedroom, with the composition weighted to the left and a large area of empty cream-colored negative space on the right. She has long slightly tousled {argument name="hair color" default="bright orange"} hair, large vivid {argument name="eye color" default="blue"} eyes, pale skin, and one clearly visible pointed elf ear decorated with a red flower hair clip. Her expression is gentle, shy, and relaxed, with a faint blush, as she rests her cheek against her hands and curls her body slightly on the bed. She wears a romantic off-shoulder {argument name="dress color" default="sage green"} dress with abundant white lace trim, floral embroidery, and 4 small red ribbon bows visible on the dress, paired with black bloomers with 1 red bow visible and white ankle socks with a tiny pink bow detail. The bed has a white ruffled pillow, pink cushions including a round frilled cushion, and a beige bunny plush toy with a pink ribbon sitting near her legs. In the background, show a small bedside table with 1 potted plant, 1 framed photo, and 1 lamp with a fabric shade, plus wall decor consisting of 1 hanging floral ornament and 2 small framed pictures. Scatter a few tiny pastel hearts and flower motifs across the empty right side. Use a delicate clean lineart style, muted pastel palette, very light beige background, flat coloring with minimal shading, airy and sweet shoujo mood, cozy bedroom aesthetic, high detail in frills and fabric, landscape format.
translatedPrompt: 一张柔和的平涂风格动漫插画，描绘了一位可爱的精灵女孩侧卧在粉彩卧室的荷叶边床上，构图重心偏左，右侧留有大面积的奶油色空白。她留着长而微乱的 {argument name="hair color" default="亮橙色"} 头发，有着明亮生动的 {argument name="eye color" default="蓝色"} 大眼睛，皮肤白皙，一只尖尖的精灵耳朵清晰可见，上面装饰着红花发夹。她表情温柔、羞涩且放松，脸颊微红，双手托腮，身体在床上微微蜷缩。她穿着一件浪漫的露肩 {argument name="dress color" default="鼠尾草绿"} 连衣裙，带有丰富的白色蕾丝饰边、花卉刺绣和 4 个可见的红色小蝴蝶结，搭配黑色灯笼裤（可见 1 个红色蝴蝶结）和带有粉色小蝴蝶结装饰的白色短袜。床上放着一个白色荷叶边枕头、粉色靠垫（包括一个圆形荷叶边靠垫），以及一只坐在她腿边、系着粉色丝带的米色兔子毛绒玩具。背景中展示了一个小床头柜，上面有 1 盆植物、1 张相框照片和 1 盏带布艺灯罩的台灯，墙面装饰包括 1 个悬挂式花卉饰品和 2 幅小相框画。在右侧的空白处散落着一些微小的粉彩心形和花朵图案。采用精致干净的线稿风格，柔和的粉彩调色板，极浅的米色背景，极简阴影的平涂上色，轻盈甜美的少女漫氛围，舒适的卧室美学，荷叶边和布料细节丰富，横向构图。

breakdown.creativeCore: 平涂风格精灵女孩与荷叶边床：此提示词可生成一张柔和的粉彩动漫卧室插画，画面中有一位慵懒的精灵女孩和大量的留白，非常适合测试平涂美学调整或创作柔和的角色艺术。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 空间概念、建筑场景、游戏场景、产品场景盒子
